paths.name: @supabase/supabase-js
paths.message: Use supabaseService from @/lib/adapters/supabase/client for app code, or add an adapter under lib/adapters/supabase/ for vendor-specific operations. See ADR-0003 (FREEZE rule).

paths.name: bcryptjs
paths.message: Use the PasswordHasher port via @/lib/wiring/password. bcryptjs may only be imported inside lib/adapters/bcrypt/. See ADR-0002 / F-10.

paths.name: @anthropic-ai/sdk
paths.message: Use the LLMExtractor port via @/lib/wiring/llm. @anthropic-ai/sdk may only be imported inside lib/adapters/anthropic/. See ADR-0002 / F-12.

paths.name: resend
paths.message: Use the Mailer port via @/lib/wiring/mailer. resend may only be imported inside lib/adapters/resend/. See ADR-0002 / F-11.

paths.name: leaflet
paths.message: Use the MapProvider port via @/lib/adapters/leaflet. leaflet may only be imported inside lib/adapters/leaflet/. See ADR-0002 / F-24.

paths.name: react-leaflet
paths.message: Use the MapProvider port via @/lib/adapters/leaflet. react-leaflet may only be imported inside lib/adapters/leaflet/. See ADR-0002 / F-24.

paths.name: @supabase/supabase-js
paths.message: Use supabaseService from @/lib/adapters/supabase/client for app code, or add an adapter under lib/adapters/supabase/ for vendor-specific operations. See ADR-0003 (FREEZE rule).

paths.name: bcryptjs
paths.message: Use the PasswordHasher port via @/lib/wiring/password. bcryptjs may only be imported inside lib/adapters/bcrypt/. See ADR-0002 / F-10.

paths.message: Use the MapProvider port via @/lib/adapters/leaflet. leaflet may only be imported inside lib/adapters/leaflet/. See ADR-0002 / F-24.

paths.message: Use the MapProvider port via @/lib/adapters/leaflet. react-leaflet may only be imported inside lib/adapters/leaflet/. See ADR-0002 / F-24.

patterns.message: Services and use-cases depend on ports, never on adapters (ADR-0002). Wire concretions in the composition root lib/wiring/ instead. See F-TD-11.

Services and use-cases must not import another service directly (ADR-0002 line 23 / F-TD-05). Compose via a use-case in lib/usecases/ or depend on the other domain's PORT. Wire concretions in lib/wiring/.
